title: 1 Egg Cake - Cottage Pudding
ingredients:
Sift: 1¾ cups cake flour, 2 tsp BP, ½ tsp salt
Add: ½ c. soft shortening, ¾ cup sugar, 1 egg, ¾ cup milk, 1 tsp vanilla
directions: 350° - 25-30 min, 9 in square, small pan. Before serving: grate with butter, 2 tbsp butter, better choc. 1 cup sugar, ½ c - vanilla
